titleStmt.title: SII 15.235: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 235. (B.K. No. 164 of 1926-27.) KAṆAGINAHĀḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab built into the wall of the Nārāyaṇadēva temple.

The epigraph which is fragmentary contains the description of the Sinda family commencing with Āchugi. It stops with the prose praśasti of Permāḍi, son of Āchugi by Mahādēvi. The text is almost identical with that found in lines 20-37 of No. 119 of South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. XI, Part II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
taḷadaṁ vega¨rtteya nṛpatiyinda rājyaśrīnārīramaṇanenisi The beginning is lost.
cugidēvaṁ . palavuṁ du¨rggaṅgaḷa koṁḍavinatanṛparaṁ tūḷdi beṁkoṇḍa da¨rppāviḷaraṁ mū¨rkkoṇḍarātikṣitipatigaḷa dēśaṁgaḷa ka
kaikoṁṇḍu lasatpuṇyakriyāsaṁbhavavibhavamananoccatagoṇḍu lakṣmīlalanākāntaṁ samantācarasanakhiḷa saukhyāspada
dhammani¨rmmāṇatatparanenisida mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ Acarasana mahāsati . parama patibrata ni¨rmmaḷacarita mahāpu
ṇyavati mahādēvi jagadvaramaṇḍaḷēśarājñīśirōvibhūṣaṇavenale jasamantaḷadaḷ . Enisida mādēvigavā jinanutanṛpatiḷa
carasaṁge janiyisidaṁ sakaḷajagajjanaha¨rṣaṁ janiyisalke pe¨rṁmmāḍinṛpaṁ . samanēṁ pe¨rmmāḍi bhūpaṁgene śucicarita
snāna dēvā¨rccana hōma mahādāna brataughadvijagurumunipūjādipuṇyakriyā prakra madiṁ dha¨rmmā¨rtthaśāstraśrutiyi
nakhiḷadibyānnadānaṁgaḷiṁduttamanānānabbyakābyaśravaṇasarasagōṣṭīviḷāsaṁgaḷiṁdaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ . Udāravīramāhēśvaraṁ . sindakuḷakamaḷamā¨rtaṇḍa . maṇḍaḷikakusuvakōdaṇḍa . sakaḷahayārūḍha prauḍa
śikṣāvicakṣaṇa . paripū¨rṇnaśubhalakṣaṇa . kavigamakivādivāgmivāgmijanasaṁstoyamāna guṇa gaṇanidāna . śivāgama sa
māka¨rṇnana ka¨rṇnapūra . sakaḷavidvajjanōddhāra . Apāraparahitācā¨ryya . Asahāya śau¨ryya . nānānayōpāya
nipuṇacāṇakya . Acaḷitavākyaśastraśāstrādisatkaḷāpravīṇa . raṇāṁgaṇadhurīṇa . bhōgōpabhōgasaṁkrandana
Anūnadānaravinandana . Anēkavidhadu¨rggava¨rggatriṇētra . Ādijacaritra śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara . maṇḍaḷikadikkuṁja
ra kābyagīta rasānubhava vinōda The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 15.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
